creator: tsr@achos.com
text:
mail/evolution needs db3 and gal v12 in order to build (at least)
but it does not depend on them. So the buuild fails unless you have
them installed already. These were the ones that popped up here,
there may be more uncovered dependencies which are fulfilled here
by accident.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/mail/evolution
make install
